name: J1939MakeName
title: J1939MakeName
syntax: void J1939MakeName( char[] retDeviceName, long selfConfiguring, long industryGroup, long deviceClassInstance, long deviceClass, long function, long functionInstance, long ECUInstance, long manufacturerCode, long identityNumber );
description: This function creates a J1939 device name.
The parameter retDeviceName must be an array with size 8. It will be filled with the device name.

parameters.name: retDeviceName
parameters.description: device name is copied in this buffer (must be 8 bytes)
